lesson.claim: Project Telos has a fifteenth-wave Lean replay rung package that compiles a bounded cyclic finite-sum theorem file for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry proof-packet ladder, preserves the prior fourteenth-wave Lean receipt source hash, refreshes Lean/formal-PDE arXiv source leads, demotes those leads to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, updates website and official-copy surfaces, and keeps smooth periodic integration by parts NOT_REPLAYED and the parent Navier-Stokes problem UNVERIFIABLE.
lesson.scope: Local fifteenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is a Lean replay for a finite List/Int closed-path telescoping identity, not smooth periodic integration by parts, not finite-dimensional vector-field integration by parts, not smooth-field formalization, not PDE correctness, not physical-fluid validation, not source-body review of arXiv papers, not exhaustive literature coverage, not native BuildLang relation-invariant support, and not an accepted publication.
